titleStmt.title: SII 15.42: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 42. (B.K. No. 188 of 1926-27.) NARĒGAL, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab inside the temple of Tripurāntaka.

The date of this inscription as read with the help of impressions secured by Fleet in 1875, is Śaka 872, Sādhāraṇa, Kārttika-amāvāsyā, Thursday, solar eclipse. This date is too early for the reign of Jagadēkamalla II. It appears, therefore, that the grant made on an earlier occasion was registered during the time of Jagadēkamalla II whose reign is referred to in the present inscription. Another inscription from this place bearing identical date is published in the South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. XI, Part II, No. 119.

The epigraph registers a gift of land made by Tippaṇayya-nāyaka to the god Tippaṇēśvara at Narayaṁgal, while Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Permmāḍidēva of the Sinda family was ruling over Kisukāḍu Seventy, [Kelavāḍi] Three-hundred, Bāgaḍage Seventy and Narayaṁgal Twelve from his capital at Erambarage. The gift was entrusted to Trilōchana-paṇḍita. The inscription which is much damaged now was well preserved about half a century ago. Cf. J.B.B.R.A.S., Vol. XI, pp. 239 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

mānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatepaṁca mahāśabda
mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ madāndhamaṇḍaḷika madanamahēśvaraṁ vairivāraṇa ghaṭavighaṭanōtu kaṁṭhakaṁṭhīravaṁ .

ntinī ś®ṁgāramaṇida¨rppaṇaṁ śiṣṭajanānīka saṁta¨rppaṇaṁ ṇukaruṇārasaviśiṣṭavijita jīmū
tavāhananuṁ sakaḷakaḷāpuṁjakaṁjananumappa Ācarasaru . palavuṁ du¨rggaṁgaḷaṁ koṇḍavi
natanṛparaṁ tūḷdi beṁkoṁḍu da¨rppāviḷaraṁ mā¨rkkoṁḍārātikṣitipatigaḷa dēśaṁ gaḷaṁ kūḍe kaikoṁḍu la
satpuṇyaṁ kriyāsaṁbhavavibhavamanaṁtōccataṁgoṁḍu lakṣmīlalanākāntaṁ samaṁtācarasana khilasaukhyāspa
daṁ khyātanādaṁ . caṁḍāṁśu pratibhāsi poysaḷananā veyaṁ koṁḍaṁ lakṣmaṇanājiyoḷu
tavisidaṁ vikrāntadiṁdeyde beṁkoṇḍaṁ sāṁḍyananāvagaṁ maleparaṁ toḷdaṭṭidaṁ koṁkaṇanaṁ koṁḍaṁ vikrama cakra
va¨rtti besasalu saṁgrāmakaṇṭhīravaṁ . tatputraṁ . jitavīradviṭpuraṁ ni¨rjjitasamadamahī nāthayū
thaṁ bhujōpā¨rjjitanānāmaṁḍaḷaṁ ta¨rjjitaripunṛpatībrapratāpōdayaṁ va¨rjjita kāḷēyaprabhā
vaprabhavakaluṣanasphū¨rjjitārātilōkō¨rjjitacāritraṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷikatimiracaṁḍāṁśu pe¨rmmū
ḍidēvaṁ . Anatakṣmāpāḷalakṣmīkumudini mugiyalu piṁgalutukriṣṭavidvajjanadāri �ṁdhakāraṁ ma
suḷalitararājaprabhāvaṁ svapādāttanṛpāsyāṁbhōruhaṁ bittarisalakhiḷadigmaṁḍaḷa vyōmasī
mā�niyaṁ pa[¨rvvi]ttaṇaṁ siṁdakuḷakamaḷa mā¨rttaṁḍa tībrapratāpaṁ . talegoṁḍaṁ kulaśēkha rāṁkana poḍappiṁ
caṭṭana muttībāḷdalegoṁḍaṁ jayakēśiyaṁ bedaṟe beṁkoṁḍaṁ pracaṁḍāvanītaḷanāthā graṇiyappa poysaḷa
na rājyaśrīyanīḷkoṁḍanaskhalitaṁ tānene rūḍhivettanaḷayoḷu pe¨rmmāḍibhūpāḷa[kaṁ .] yalu biṭṭiga
niddakoḷḷigana ghaṭṭaṁ keydi dhāḷiṭṭu dhōrene kidaretti beluhuramaṁ koṁḍante beṁbatti khaḍgasahāyaṁ
taguḷutta vāhaḍiya ghaṭṭaṁ maṭṭi taḷu taṭṭikoṁdu sutējaṁ mige pe¨rmmabhūpati jaga dvikhyāti
yaṁ tāḷdidaṁ . biṭṭiganṛpāḷanoḍanire viṭṭigevaṁda rasugeḍegaḷaṁ raṇa doḷu taḷutaṭṭi piḍidāne
yanitumanoṭṭajiyiṁtadanasamasāhasatuṁga . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ ma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ . Udāravīralakṣmīśvara siṁdakuḷakamaḷamā¨rttaṁḍa . maṁḍaḷika kusuma kōdaṇḍa
kaḷahayārūḍhaprauḍha śikṣāvicakṣaṇa paripū¨rṇna śubhalakṣaṇa kavigamakivādi vāgmi
janasaṁstūyamāna guṇagaṇavidhāna śivā samāka¨rṇnana ka¨rṇnapūra . sakaḷa vidvajjanādhāra A
pāra parahitācā¨ryya . Asahāyaśau¨ryya nānānayōpāyanipuṇacāṇakya
Acaḷitanākya . śastra śāstrādi satukaḷaughapravīṇa . raṇāṁgaṇadhurīṇa bhōgōpabhōga saṁkraṁ
dana Anūnadānaravinaṁdana Anēkavidhadu¨rggava¨rggatriṇētra . Ādhirājacaritra . śaraṇā
gatavajrapaṁjara maṇḍaḷikadikkuṁjara kāvyagītarasānubhavavinōda śrī śaṁkaradēvalabdha varaprasā
dādi nāmāvaḷī virājitarappa śrī manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ pe¨rmmāḍi dēvarasaru kisukāḍe ppattuṁ kelavāḍi
mūnūṟuṁ bāgaḍege yeppattuṁ . narayaṁgallu paṁneraḍuṁ mintinitaṟubhayasāmyanuṁ duṣṭanigraha vi
śiṣṭapratipāḷanayiṁderaṁbarageya nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyaṁ ttami
re . © jaḷanidhiparivṛtavasudhātaḷadoḷu bharatō¨rvvigeseva kuṁtaḷadēśaṁ tiḷakaminisidudada rūḷu phaḷa
bharitaṁ narayaṁgellaṁ karaṁ raṁjisuguṁ . vacana . Aṁtu sogayisuva narayaṁgalla teṁkaṇa bhāgada hiriya
hannasina tippaṇayyanāyakaru tippaṇēśvaradēva¨rgge tanna hannasina baḷadoḷage sakhava¨rṣa 872 ḍeneya
sādhāṁṇa saṁvatsarada kā¨rttikadamavāsye brihaspativāradaṁdina sū¨ryyagraha
ṇadoḷu triḷōcanapaṁḍita¨rgge dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭu koṭṭa Aruvaṇada matta ¨rmmūvattu
maṁ kuṁyyabaḷḷadiṁ mūḍa mūḍa pādaholavaṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga teneya baḷadi teṁkaṇa nālku go
tapodhanaruṁ kavileyuṁ berasu māḍi niṟisida kinnarigallaguḍḍa nālku dēvara nivē
śaṇa śrīvāgiliṁ mūḍa kōṭeyiṁ paḍuva gavuṇḍabaḷadiṁ baḍaga rājabīdiyiṁ teṁka nālku go
ga kiṁnnarigalla guḍḍe nālku dēva¨rggetippaṇayya biṭṭa gāṇa 1 jakkileya baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa
Ācēśvara mānyadiṁ teṁka mānyadatōṁṭa matta 1 kkaṁ kinnarigallaguḍḍe nālku jakkileya baṭṭeyiṁ
paḍuva sōbhanēśvara tōṁṭadiṁ baḍaga dēvagāvuṇḍaṁ biṭṭa mānyada tōṭa matta 1 kkaṁ kinnarigallaguḍḍe
nālku yi mana pa ruvaru padineṇbaruṁ . paṁcamaṭhasthāna
svasti śrīmatu jagadēkamalla pemmāḍidēvarasaru yiṁntī dha¨rmmamaṁ
dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷi
sāsira catu¨rvvēda pāraga pātakaṁ
damaged
Digital edition of SII 15.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
